critical_findings.description: Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)
critical_findings.code_snippet: createWebviewPanel("pyxel.view", "Pyxel", { viewColumn: vscode.ViewColumn.Beside, preserveFocus: true }, { enableScripts: true

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
